title: ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Research Associate Posts
description: Acharya NG Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Research Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in M.Sc, Ph.D, can use this opportunity and apply for the ANGRAU Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
